name: snackbar
description: Snackbar — Menu bar automations for macOS

scripts.postinstall: if [ -d node_modules/electron ] && [ ! -d node_modules/electron-pkg ]; then mv node_modules/electron node_modules/electron-pkg && ln -sf ../electron-pkg/cli.js node_modules/.bin/electron && sed -i '' 's/"name": "electron"/"name": "electron-pkg"/' node_modules/electron-pkg/package.json; fi
